query_normalized: robotic artificial intelligence algorithms for autonomous vehicle navigation robotics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (d) as a foundational methodology reference for the "Autonomous Vehicle Navigation" component of the user's question, specifically addressing the path planning algorithmic challenge (a core sub-problem of navigation) using exact optimization techniques.
